name: Medtronic plc
summary: Medtronic plc, headquartered in Galway, Ireland, is a global healthcare technology company founded in 1949. It develops, manufactures, and sells device-based medical therapies across four segments: Cardiovascular Portfolio, Neuroscience Portfolio, Medical Surgical Portfolio, and Diabetes Operating Unit. Key products include implantable pacemakers (Micra, Azure), cardiac ablation systems, TAVR systems (Evolut FX+), spinal robotics (Mazor), neurostimulators, insulin pumps, and surgical navigation systems (StealthStation S8), serving patients in over 150 countries.

products.name: Micra Transcatheter Pacing System
products.description: Leadless implantable pacemaker including Micra VR and Micra AV families treating atrioventricular block.

products.name: Azure MRI SureScan Pacemaker
products.description: Implantable pacemaker featuring BlueSync technology for automatic secure wireless remote monitoring.

products.name: Aurora Extravascular-ICD
products.description: Implantable cardioverter defibrillator for cardiac rhythm management.

products.name: Cobalt/Crome BlueSync CRT-D
products.description: Cardiac resynchronization therapy defibrillators with BlueSync wireless remote monitoring technology.

products.name: PulseSelect Pulsed Field Ablation Catheter
products.description: Single shot pulsed field ablation catheter for treatment of atrial fibrillation.

products.name: Sphere-9 Focal Catheter
products.description: High density mapping catheter with dual RF and pulsed field energies for cardiac ablation.

products.name: Affera Mapping and Navigation System
products.description: Electrophysiology mapping and navigation system with Prism-1 software for improving patient outcomes.

products.name: Arctic Front Advanced Cardiac Cryoablation System
products.description: Cryoablation system for treatment of atrial fibrillation.

products.name: Reveal LINQ / LINQ II
products.description: Insertable cardiac monitoring systems with AccuRhythm AI for long-term arrhythmia monitoring.

products.name: TYRX Absorbable Antibacterial Envelope
products.description: Device envelope designed to stabilize implantable cardiac/neuro devices and prevent surgical site infections.

products.name: Evolut FX+ TAVR System
products.description: Transcatheter aortic valve replacement system for treatment of aortic valve disorders.

products.name: Endurant II Stent Graft System
products.description: Endovascular stent graft for treatment of abdominal aortic aneurysms.

products.name: Harmony Transcatheter Pulmonary Valve
products.description: Transcatheter pulmonary valve and delivery catheter system for pulmonary valve replacement.

products.name: Melody TPV / Ensemble II Delivery System
products.description: Transcatheter pulmonary valve therapy system.

products.name: Onyx Frontier / Resolute Onyx Drug-Eluting Stents
products.description: Percutaneous coronary intervention drug-eluting stents for treatment of coronary artery disease.

products.name: Symplicity Spyral Renal Denervation System
products.description: Catheter-based renal denervation system for treatment of hypertension.

products.name: IN.PACT Drug-Coated Balloons
products.description: Percutaneous angioplasty drug-coated balloons for peripheral vascular disease treatment.

products.name: VenaSeal Closure System
products.description: System to treat superficial venous diseases in lower extremities.

products.name: ClosureFast Radiofrequency Ablation System
products.description: Radiofrequency ablation system for treatment of superficial venous disease.

products.name: StealthStation S8 Surgical Navigation System
products.description: Surgical navigation system for neurological and spine procedures within the AiBLE ecosystem.

products.name: Mazor Robotic Guidance System
products.description: Robotic guidance system used in robot-assisted spine procedures.

products.name: O-arm Imaging System
products.description: Intraoperative imaging system used in spine and cranial procedures.

products.name: UNiD Adaptive Spine Intelligence
products.description: AI-driven technology for surgical planning and personalized spinal implants.

products.name: Stealth Autoguide Cranial Robotic Guidance Platform
products.description: Robotic cranial guidance platform for neurological procedures.

products.name: Infuse Bone Graft (InductOs)
products.description: Recombinant human bone morphogenetic protein-2 biologic for spinal, trauma, and oral maxillofacial applications.

products.name: CATALYFT PL Expandable Interbody Spacers
products.description: Expandable interbody spacers for spine surgery.

products.name: AccuRhythm AI
products.description: AI algorithm integrated into LINQ devices to reduce clinic workload and data burden in cardiac monitoring.
